themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "Then the king's servants, which were in the king's gate, said unto Mordecai, Why transgresses...". Word-study detail reinforces "מִצְוַ֥ת: commandment - a command, whether human or divine (collectively, the law)".
